GrossProfit.notes: Auto-excluded: concept absent from all XBRL sources

PropertyPlantEquipment.reason: Phase 14: yfinance includes OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset in PPE. XBRL excludes it. Validated via composite formula across 7 of 15 cohort companies (FDX, ACN, PANW, INTU, EMR, IBM, AON) with exact match.
